name: Cory Booker
subject: I want to fill you in on my debate prep
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team -- Now that the debate lineups are set, my team and I are working hard to prepare for the big night. For an underdog campaign like ours, so much is riding on these big moments. It's a rare opportunity to compete on a level playing field with the frontrunners -- especially the campaigns that have more money in the bank. But I know that when I'm on that stage, I'm representing this whole team. So I want to try something out, and I hope you'll be part of it. [_**Sign up to join me on an exclusive campaign call this Wednesday, July 24 at 5:45 PM ET during one of my debate prep sessions, and I 'll fill you in on how I'm getting ready.**_](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc084e/5fca0d19/da3b4ed/2918109d/2445587085/VEsH/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://act.corybooker.com/page/s/join-corys-exclusive-campaign-call?source=em_rsvp_20190722_CB_20190722-rsvp-CB-debcall-actives_actives_l1") I know that this second debate is kind of an audition. We haven't yet qualified for the fall debates -- we're still short of the 130,000 unique donors you need to make the September stage. So I hope to show Democrats across the country that I belong -- that our message and our ideas need to be part of the national debate this fall. I'm working hard now to make sure I hit that mark. If you want to hear more about how I'm preparing, _**[join me on this call on Wednesday, July 24.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc084e/5fca0d19/da3b4ed/2918109c/2445587085/VEsE/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/join-corys-exclusive-campaign-call?source=em_rsvp_20190722_CB_20190722-rsvp-CB-debcall-actives_actives_l2")**_ Thank you, Cory
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc084e/5fca0d19/da3b4ed/2918109b/2445587085/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc084e/5fca0d19/da3b4ed/2918109a/2445587085/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc084e/5fca0d19/da3b4ed/29181099/2445587085/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc084e/5fca0d19/da3b4ed/29181098/2445587085/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc084e/5fca0d19/da3b4ed/291810e7/2445587085/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc084e/5fca0d19/da3b4ed/2918109b/2445587085/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: Stop the bans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

_You are receiving this email because you have previously supported Democratic leaders in Washington. To learn more about how Patty Murray is fighting for our families as the senior senator from Washington,[**click here**](http://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a6935b6/22080b68/7e27ff97/4602e5f7/3977540810/VEsH/?g= "https://pattymurray.com/"). To unsubscribe from future emails, [**click here**](http://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a6935b6/22080b68/7e27ff97/4602e5f6/3977540810/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g= "http://act.pattymurray.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")._
[**SIGN ON: Stand with women and oppose GOP attacks on abortion rights.**](http://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a6935b6/22080b68/7e27ff97/4602e5f5/3977540810/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6Ijk4MjA4IiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/?g= "https://act.pattymurray.com/page/s/stand-with-women-iws?source=em190722&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=")
Team,
As GOP lawmakers from Alabama to Missouri move to ban abortion, their motives are clear: they want to challenge abortion rights at the Supreme Court. We've got to keep fighting back.
In the Senate, I am doing everything in my power to stand with women and their freedom to make their own choices about their lives and their bodies--including safe, legal abortion.
[**We can 't stand by while Republicans attack abortion rights and try to criminalize patients and their doctors. Add your name to tell the GOP to stop these dangerous abortion bans.**](http://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a6935b6/22080b68/7e27ff97/4602e5f5/3977540810/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6Ijk4MjA4IiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/?g= "https://act.pattymurray.com/page/s/stand-with-women-iws?source=em190722&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=")
The vast majority of Americans support the fundamental right to choose and do not want to see Roe v. Wade overturned. They understand that when a woman can make her own health care decisions, she can plan her family, plan her future, and stay financially secure. The GOP's abortion bans are not only harmful to women, they are out of step with what the American people want from their leaders.
These abortion bans are a real threat to our constitutional rights. It's up to all of us to take a stand for reproductive freedom and tell GOP politicians to stop attacking women's health.
**[Add your name now to tell Republicans we won't back down on abortion rights.](http://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a6935b6/22080b68/7e27ff97/4602e5f5/3977540810/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6Ijk4MjA4IiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/?g= "https://act.pattymurray.com/page/s/stand-with-women-iws?source=em190722&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=")**
Thank you,
Patty

**[SIGN THE PETITION](http://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a6935b6/22080b68/7e27ff97/4602e5f5/3977540810/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6Ijk4MjA4IiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/?g= "https://act.pattymurray.com/page/s/stand-with-women-iws?source=em190722&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=")**

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let us know if you would like to [unsubscribe](http://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a6935b6/22080b68/7e27ff97/4602e5f6/3977540810/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g= "http://act.pattymurray.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join us today in fighting for progressive values and resisting Trump's agenda: [donate now](http://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a6935b6/22080b68/7e27ff97/4602e5f4/3977540810/VEsO/?g= "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-emailfooter?recurring=yes").

name: Team Kamala
subject: Behind where we need to be
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
We’re going to get straight to the point -- we need your help. Each month, we set fundraising goals that we must hit in order to provide enough resources to win this race. When we fall short on those goals, we lose ground to our opponents -- making it harder to win this election. With just over a week left until the deadline, we’re behind on our fundraising goals for July -- and we have to find a way to catch up. So we’re asking every Kamala supporter to help us get back on track: **With the debate and this fundraising deadline, next week is really important for Kamala and our grassroots campaign -- can you chip in a donation before it’s too late?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $5 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190722?refcode=ema190722-2-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1&refcode2=5639_5755789_2Gee3Z&akid=5639%2E5755789%2E2Gee3Z)

---
| [Chip in $100 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190722?refcode=ema190722-2-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=100&express_lane=true&t=4&refcode2=5639_5755789_2Gee3Z&akid=5639%2E5755789%2E2Gee3Z)

| | [Chip in $250 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190722?refcode=ema190722-2-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=250&express_lane=true&t=5&refcode2=5639_5755789_2Gee3Z&akid=5639%2E5755789%2E2Gee3Z)
---
| [Another Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190722?refcode=ema190722-2-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=6&refcode2=5639_5755789_2Gee3Z&akid=5639%2E5755789%2E2Gee3Z)
---
Kamala has surged in the polls in recent weeks, which means we have a real chance to win this election. But we can’t win if we fall short of these goals and fail to support our volunteers and organizers on the ground.
That’s why your donation, of any amount, matters so much today.
Thanks for everything,
— Team Kamala

PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE

name: M.E. Smith, Team Hickenlooper
subject: "Don't Count Hick Out Just Yet"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
This race is actually wide open. There are months to go before the primaries, and thousands of voters to meet and persuade. With your continued support, we can keep this a real contest. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377172b/691c9bd/6d3a718a/11a46c03/1840261074/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| ****[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190722_MES_20190722-fr-MES-countouttopper-nop_nop_i1&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**** Just recently, friend, we told you to keep one thing in mind, no matter what polls, pundits or political insiders say:

**This race is actually wide open. There are months to go before the primaries, and thousands of voters to meet and persuade.** [**_With your continued support, we can keep this a real contest._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190722_MES_20190722-fr-MES-countouttopper-nop_nop_l1&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Here in Colorado, we know well that you can never predict what's going to happen in a race.

The unexpected happened when John ran for mayor of Denver. He began as a dark horse--a restaurateur and activist who'd revitalized downtown Denver but had never held office--and walked away the victor.

The unexpected happened both times John ran for Governor--including his re-election in a year that saw most Democrats swept out of office across Colorado.

As beloved Colorado journalist Lynn Bartels says: **Don 't count Hick out just yet.**

John is the only candidate who has run a small business, a city, and a state. And while doing it, he's gotten big, bold, progressive things done that others in this race have only talked about.

**As I said: You can never predict what 's going to happen in politics.** What we know is that, with your help, John is putting in the hard work to introduce himself to voters and share his vision in every community he travels to. That's the work that will truly pay off in this primary.

**With your help, John can take this across the finish line. Chip in now to make sure he gets there.** ****[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190722_MES_20190722-fr-MES-countouttopper-nop_nop_b1&recurring=auto&amount=1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**** Thank you,
M.E.

M.E. Smith
Campaign Director
Hickenlooper 2020 ****** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190722_MES_20190722-fr-MES-countouttopper-nop_nop_contribbutton&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")********

Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377172b/691c9bd/6d3a718a/11a46c36/1840261074/VEsHBw/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377172b/691c9bd/6d3a718a/11a46c37/1840261074/VEsHBg/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377172b/691c9bd/6d3a718a/11a46c34/1840261074/VEsHAQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377172b/691c9bd/6d3a718a/11a46c35/1840261074/VEsHAA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--but if at any point you'd like to opt out, you can do so right [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377172b/691c9bd/6d3a718a/11a46c32/1840261074/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please [_**update your information here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377172b/691c9bd/6d3a718a/11a46c39/1840261074/VEsHAg/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in").

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Add your name: fix the inhumane conditions at the border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
On Friday, I was part of the Senate Democratic delegation sent to inspect the migrant facilities in McAllen, Texas. I was horrified by what I saw. We, as a nation, must do much better.
Children at these facilities have been denied the ability to brush their teeth, to bathe, or even to get a good night's sleep. We've seen reports of people being denied enough food and water.
**[Add your name right now: tell the Trump Administration to immediately fix the inhumane conditions at the border and work to fix our broken immigration system.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cf7/42ab3cf4/6208a34e/135d75dd/1431598800/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fix-the-inhumane-conditions-at-the-border?source=em190722&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
We're treating people as criminals, even though the acting head of the CBP told us the vast majority of migrants coming into the U.S. have committed no crimes -- and coming to the U.S. seeking asylum is not illegal.
No one should be subject to these inhumane conditions, but no matter what you think about immigration policy, surely we can all agree that we should be protecting the children who arrive at our border.
**[Sign on now: tell the Trump Administration to treat children and all migrants who arrive at our border seeking asylum with compassion, not cruelty.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cf7/42ab3cf4/6208a34e/135d75dd/1431598800/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fix-the-inhumane-conditions-at-the-border?source=em190722&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[Sign the Petition](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cf7/42ab3cf4/6208a34e/135d75dd/1431598800/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fix-the-inhumane-conditions-at-the-border?source=em190722&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

name: Organizing Team, Cory 2020
subject: Cory's Crew guide to the best DNC Debate experience
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Wednesday, July 31st is the big night. That's when Cory will be in Detroit on the stage for the second DNC Debate. While Cory's up there, supporters around the country will be cheering him on. We wanted to share some tips on how to make the most of debate night: 1. [**Be a Debate Watch Party host.**](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc084f/5fca0d19/dd6c010/29186f5b/3342673657/VEsH/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.mobilize.us/corybooker/event/create/") Debates aren't meant to be watched alone! Host your neighbors and enjoy the debate together. We'll provide you with the support you need to make it a success. If you can't host this time, no worries. [**Sign up here to get notified about Watch Parties you can attend in your area.**](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc084f/5fca0d19/dd6c010/29186f5a/3342673657/VEsE/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://act.corybooker.com/page/s/sign-up-to-get-notifications-about-events-in-your-area?source=em_20190723") 2\. Campaign swag is essential. [**Check out the Cory 2020 store to purchase the latest merchandise from the campaign.**](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc084f/5fca0d19/dd6c010/29186f58/3342673657/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://shop.corybooker.com/") We have t-shirts, buttons, stickers, yard signs, and more! [](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc084f/5fca0d19/dd6c010/29186f59/3342673657/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://shop.corybooker.com/cory-2020-debate-watch-kit?source=em_20190723") 3\. Join the conversation online by amplifying Cory's message on social media during the debate. Spread the word on Facebook and Twitter about why you're supporting Cory -- and remember to use our hashtag #Cory2020. Let the world know why you're so proud to be a member of Team Cory. [**Click here to get your social media toolkit so you 'll be debate day ready.**](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc084f/5fca0d19/dd6c010/29186fa7/3342673657/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1v7RowuFDQ8hYEwkMr0e1rp0fOYOxfG7J/view") Get ready, team. This is going to be an exciting night. [**So don 't delay, sign up today to be a Debate Watch Party host and help cheer Cory on to victory!**](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc084f/5fca0d19/dd6c010/29186f5b/3342673657/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.mobilize.us/corybooker/event/create/") Team Cory [](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190722-em1?refcode=em_x_20190723_OTC2020_20190723-rsvp-OTC2020-houseparties-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc084f/5fca0d19/dd6c010/29186fa5/3342673657/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc084f/5fca0d19/dd6c010/29186fa4/3342673657/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc084f/5fca0d19/dd6c010/29186fa3/3342673657/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc084f/5fca0d19/dd6c010/29186fa2/3342673657/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc084f/5fca0d19/dd6c010/29186fa1/3342673657/VEsHBg/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").

name: Robert Foster
subject: GOP Debate Tonight ⏰
body:
Join us tonight at 7
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| Friends,
Robert and I are so excited about tonight's final debate before the August 6th Primary. I know he is looking forward to making his case as a political outsider who can bring a fresh perspective and an outside-the-box way of thinking to our state government.
That's why I wanted to reach out to you on his behalf. Before he goes on stage at 7:00 PM CST, I want to remind him how many people are invested in this campaign.
It's hard to ask you to do more. [But, I believe your donation of $100, $50, $25, or even $5 will help boost Robert's confidence before the big debate tonight. ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jKuiMb_a1x5-4XRiNqRIN1QWW-wqRHdySOCjgzL-1nFVp-Hw-evQhSsEf3z6EdSJCFPEtR_xsO9a_brcraNQ9dBj35ZQsQj_c1tH4ib94zQSogZgP_nBCvvqVHbM3n1L5HZd-RQzbc9Kt42iA3b3J6QYB-fGY-vr028ASUDvHPMW2YlRAb_oEHFWHuAGxJU6qa4-JUxIQps6WzGAJVnfbnkxbvDwEHNa&c=k0LyqvSMUD1XXM76qb3Q0TyiDg0W685FNXhETI-ebdU6MuvV6Y1tVw==&ch=YHWfOgM5f7-4ikPZJiprGboEaGanDAEy2NqWFOP-QQRNu7eI0xSaQg==)
People are hungry for a change to the status quo, and I know my husband is exactly what Mississippi needs.
With your help, we will win this election; and I can assure you that every dollar invested will be wisely spent by our campaign.
We truly covet your prayers and support. We hope you will watch the debate live on TV tonight, or, if you don't have a station or provider in your area, you can check out the livestream on SuperTalk Radio and WJTV's Facebook page or website.
Gratefully,
Heather Foster

clean_body: Join us tonight at 7 | | | | | | | | | | | | Friends, Robert and I are so excited about tonight's final debate before the August 6th Primary. I know he is looking forward to making his case as a political outsider who can bring a fresh perspective and an outside-the-box way of thinking to our state government. That's why I wanted to reach out to you on his behalf. Before he goes on stage at 7:00 PM CST, I want to remind him how many people are invested in this campaign. It's hard to ask you to do more. == People are hungry for a change to the status quo, and I know my husband is exactly what Mississippi needs. With your help, we will win this election; and I can assure you that every dollar invested will be wisely spent by our campaign. We truly covet your prayers and support. We hope you will watch the debate live on TV tonight, or, if you don't have a station or provider in your area, you can check out the livestream on SuperTalk Radio and WJTV's Facebook page or website. name: Jason Yates
subject: You can activate your church!
body:
| | Peter, Here’s an exciting opportunity for you to roll-up your sleeves and help the churchgoers at your church register and vote to advance biblical values. **On Sunday, September 22, 2019 churches across the nation are participating in[Voter Registration Sunday](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=lROsI8Y7B9BWlZ2-cpdKXIKkeSI4MrcIhR7-Og50mNHwpRafOpxA8QS5mpuzuSwv_Xbwp5lCwFJMeWDvEfP6125oNvQhMmAKATb52JkxzJrZrzK5_oTjklbr6ItCaLPMxHxfF9JoZlfDvY1c-av6iA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190723com01&n=1).** **This is an effort led by churchgoers who desire to see 100% of their church congregation vote in every election from the local to the federal level.** 90 million Christians in America are eligible to vote, but as many as _40 million fail to vote_ in presidential election cycles. And 15 million are not even registered to vote. Yes, the 2020 elections are over 16 months away, but there are over 80,000 elections happening across the country this year. And there are over 100,000 elections happening throughout 2020. Together, we can help change the statistics of Christian voter turnout by participating in a national day of civic engagement in our churches. In [this link](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=lROsI8Y7B9BWlZ2-cpdKXIKkeSI4MrcIhR7-Og50mNHwpRafOpxA8QS5mpuzuSwv_Xbwp5lCwFJMeWDvEfP6125oNvQhMmAKATb52JkxzJrZrzK5_oTjklbr6ItCaLPMxHxfF9JoZlfDvY1c-av6iA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190723com01&n=2) you will find a comprehensive Voter Registration Sunday toolkit containing all the resources and instructions you need to approach your pastor or church leadership to host a successful voter drive at your church. **Please keep in mind:**
* All of these tools are non-partisan and do not endorse a political party or candidate.
* Your church can use all or some of the materials that best meet your needs.
* As a member of your church body, there is no one better positioned to advocate for civic engagement in the voting process than you!

We pray these materials can help you activate others in your church to civic engagement and reveal the incredible opportunity we have as Christians to use our votes and biblical truth as a conduit for good in our communities. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=lROsI8Y7B9BWlZ2-cpdKXIKkeSI4MrcIhR7-Og50mNHwpRafOpxA8QS5mpuzuSwv_Xbwp5lCwFJMeWDvEfP6125oNvQhMmAKATb52JkxzJrZrzK5_oTjklbr6ItCaLPMxHxfF9JoZlfDvY1c-av6iA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190723com01&n=3) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190723com01&n=4)
---
* * *
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190723com01&n=5).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190723com01&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190723com01&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190723com01&n=8)

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: Taking marijuana off the Controlled Substance Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
https://teresatomlinson.com/legalize-marijuana/?refcode=em072319a&noskip=true&emci=f3f9a592-79ad-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&emdi=f4f9a592-79ad-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&ceid=463701&contactdata=Ty1g%2BrxmemKD3kaqAbBWgb%2BbRFs44SutS2Alk76iprmb63LgvX4OrrEc2QGh10cgWpfVDDjzJWuc32KimmzCEEQuEN0pbO1A5iXwVIKJxiU%3D [https://teresatomlinson.com/legalize-marijuana/?refcode=em072319a&noskip=true&emci=f3f9a592-79ad-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&emdi=f4f9a592-79ad-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&ceid=463701&contactdata=Ty1g%2BrxmemKD3kaqAbBWgb%2BbRFs44SutS2Alk76iprmb63LgvX4OrrEc2QGh10cgWpfVDDjzJWuc32KimmzCEEQuEN0pbO1A5iXwVIKJxiU%3D]

Friend,

Did you know that states spend roughly $3.6 billion every year on marijuana enforcement and that 599,282 people were arrested for simple possession of marijuana in 2017?

If you’re with the more than 50% of Americans who think these numbers are absurd, and agree that it’s about time we remove marijuana from the Controlled Substances Act, add your name. [https://teresatomlinson.com/legalize-marijuana/?refcode=em072319a&noskip=true&emci=f3f9a592-79ad-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&emdi=f4f9a592-79ad-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&ceid=463701&contactdata=Ty1g%2BrxmemKD3kaqAbBWgb%2BbRFs44SutS2Alk76iprmb63LgvX4OrrEc2QGh10cgWpfVDDjzJWuc32KimmzCEEQuEN0pbO1A5iXwVIKJxiU%3D]

Add your name [https://teresatomlinson.com/legalize-marijuana/?refcode=em072319a&noskip=true&emci=f3f9a592-79ad-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&emdi=f4f9a592-79ad-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&ceid=463701&contactdata=Ty1g%2BrxmemKD3kaqAbBWgb%2BbRFs44SutS2Alk76iprmb63LgvX4OrrEc2QGh10cgWpfVDDjzJWuc32KimmzCEEQuEN0pbO1A5iXwVIKJxiU%3D]

The benefits of legalizing marijuana far outweigh the cons. For starters, the racial disparities for marijuana-related crimes are overwhelming and indicate that legalization – along with expungement and commutation – would begin to fix what is broken in an institutionally racist criminal justice system. Especially considering that Black and brown Americans are nearly 4 times more likely to be arrested for simple possession even though we know smoking pot isn’t limited to race.

Legalizing marijuana could also have a dramatically positive impact on our farmers – both here in Georgia and across the country – opening up new markets for a cash crop that is easy to grow, cultivate, and distribute.

And just as importantly, the medicinal benefits of marijuana are extremely promising and will only continue to grow as doctors and scientists are finally allowed to study the drug more thoroughly. Marijuana access could allow children with epilepsy, military veterans with PTSD, cancer patients of all ages, and elderly people with glaucoma to all live better, healthier lives.

This is simple: It’s time to decriminalize, legalize, and regulate marijuana as a medicinal and recreational substance. Add your name if you’re with us. Together, I know we can create the momentum to make this meaningful change.

Teresa

clean_body: [] Friend, Did you know that states spend roughly $3.6 billion every year on marijuana enforcement and that 599,282 people were arrested for simple possession of marijuana in 2017? If you’re with the more than 50% of Americans who think these numbers are absurd, and agree that it’s about time we remove marijuana from the Controlled Substances Act, add your name. [] Add your name [] The benefits of legalizing marijuana far outweigh the cons. For starters, the racial disparities for marijuana-related crimes are overwhelming and indicate that legalization – along with expungement and commutation – would begin to fix what is broken in an institutionally racist criminal justice system. Especially considering that Black and brown Americans are nearly 4 times more likely to be arrested for simple possession even though we know smoking pot isn’t limited to race. Legalizing marijuana could also have a dramatically positive impact on our farmers – both here in Georgia and across the country – opening up new markets for a cash crop that is easy to grow, cultivate, and distribute. And just as importantly, the medicinal benefits of marijuana are extremely promising and will only continue to grow as doctors and scientists are finally allowed to study the drug more thoroughly. Marijuana access could allow children with epilepsy, military veterans with PTSD, cancer patients of all ages, and elderly people with glaucoma to all live better, healthier lives. This is simple: It’s time to decriminalize, legalize, and regulate marijuana as a medicinal and recreational substance. Add your name if you’re with us. [] Together, I know we can create the momentum to make this meaningful change. Yours truly, Teresa ADD YOUR NAME [] <<View this email in your browser.>> [] PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: why it's crucial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
---
Peter,

Last week, my team reached out to you about making a donation to help us reach our fundraising goal.

**[This is critical, so I'm taking a moment to personally ask if you can make a small donation of $10. Please consider making a contribution, then let me tell you why it's crucial that I have your grassroots support in my re-election race. >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/jgbMTS5spBbHC-c1irTkX_344wO6Cdlci6FPOTST-Cc=/yEfAxan64I-l_-oB8z_OtiEVDmLCYYqkPEQjUEZD5zc=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190723-1-EM&amount=25)**

From day one, I centered my run for Congress on finding common ground with individuals across the political spectrum so we could make progress on the issues that affect Central Virginia families. That message resonated with voters across our district -- _and the nation_ \-- who were sick and tired of politicians who deepened partisan wounds by isolating themselves in the extreme corners of their parties.

**Their inaction hurt everyday Americans, and together, we said "_no more._ " Instead, our new generation of leaders is building bridges -- not burning them.**

I'm reaching across the aisle and finding allies who are eager to make progress on the challenges of day-to-day life. In fact, bipartisan legislation I authored to increase transparency in prescription drug pricing passed out of two committees and is working its way towards becoming law.

There are countless other issues I'm confident we can find common ground on, but to do that, **we need to keep this district in the hands of voters and out of the pockets of dark money donors funding extreme ideologues.**

**[Peter -- Your grassroots support today can help us make the most of these early fundraising deadlines and put us in a strong position to cross the finish line again with a victory in hand. Will you make a donation of any size so we can reach our goal?>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/jgbMTS5spBbHC-c1irTkX_344wO6Cdlci6FPOTST-Cc=/yEfAxan64I-l_-oB8z_OtiEVDmLCYYqkPEQjUEZD5zc=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190723-1-EM&amount=25)** | **[CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/jgbMTS5spBbHC-c1irTkX_344wO6Cdlci6FPOTST-Cc=/yEfAxan64I-l_-oB8z_OtiEVDmLCYYqkPEQjUEZD5zc=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190723-1-EM&amount=25)**
---
Thank you so much.

_Abigail_

* * *
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/jgbMTS5spBbHC-c1irTkX_344wO6Cdlci6FPOTST-Cc=/7vrisw0O3eHjzBbZ4_J7LxeHbX7CN2FsdVuvOxxnVUs=?refcode=BLU-footer&recurring=true) Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. body:
Hi, I'm Sheetal, and I need your help. Last year, we ran the most unique campaign in the entire country, reaching out to immigrants in 15 different languages.

This is what that looked like:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/y-LU8uX0fyMQ6mXAC0W1I_5M8KA6ZHLbtEKsM48yWns=/yMNmmJ8WrdmQumIOp--uWQp9pIhiWE7b8yKTDb8XRto=)

We did this is because Sri believes that everyone should have a voice in America, regardless of your religion, race, gender, country of origin, or native language. Our campaign was extremely successful, resulting in 37,000 new people voting who hadn't voted in the previous presidential election. But we need to do more.

We want to register over 50,000 new voters before the next election. In order to do this, we need to reach every single community of our District, which speaks over 100 languages. If you can speak another language, please click on the language you can speak below, so we know which community you can help with.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce11/3eb3e2fc/5a54badd/744a37df/2588823374/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce11/3eb3e2fc/5a54badd/744a37de/2588823374/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce11/3eb3e2fc/5a54badd/744a37dd/2588823374/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

body:
We'll get to the point: we need your help, everyone.
Some of our fundraising deadlines are required by the government, and others we set internally so that we can keep our campaign on track.
**When we fall short, it means that we put this vulnerable seat (which we only won by 1,017 votes!) in jeopardy. With just over a week to go, we 're pretty far behind for July.**
[**Senator Hassan only unseated Republican Kelly Ayotte by a fraction of a percent, so every single goal -- even July's -- is critical. Will you please give $3 or as much as you can to help us get back on track?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc271/2a380d31/3f2fe4e5/f0cf45/2785543549/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDcyM19mcjFfUk8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20190723_fr1_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb46b0/4bd7760e/4857c066/77e71cae/4238887356/VEsEBA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footer?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=21+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190723_GoroffUpdate_U2_X2&source=314_EM_FR_190723_GoroffUpdate_U2_X2")

name: Team Tim
subject: there are so many ways to get involved
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Our movement is growing every day, and it's because the country is finally paying attention to our message and the priorities we want to push forward -- economic justice, a stronger middle class, access to affordable health care, and so on.

Now that the campaign is picking up steam, we want to keep this momentum going. We are only as strong as our supporters -- so can we ask you to commit to joining our grassroots movement today?

**There are so many ways to get involved, folks! We would love for you to be a member of Team Tim in any capacity, whether it 's through...**
* [**Making a contribution to fuel our movement**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-july2019?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190723_1_1_T2&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+Making+a+contribution+to+fuel+our+moveme&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190723_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190723_1_1_T2")
* [**Becoming a community endorser**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9c04/5486deaa/231e5772/dc8ab80/2725819430/VEsE/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/s/become-a-community-endorser-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+Becoming+a+community+endorser&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190723_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190723_1_1_T2")
* [**Or committing to host a debate watch party**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9c04/5486deaa/231e5772/dc8ab83/2725819430/VEsF/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/s/sign-up-to-host-a-second-debate-watch-party?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+Or+committing+to+host+a+debate+watch+par&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190723_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190723_1_1_T2")

Regardless of the route you decide to take, please know that we are forever grateful for the energy and dedication you've poured into this campaign.

We are only just beginning -- will you join us?

Team Tim

|
---
Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
Contribute now to help Tim take his vision for our future across the United States! name: Team Beto
subject: We can flip this district:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
In a district roiled by a major ballot fraud scandal, Dan McCready is hoping to flip North Carolina’s 9th from red to blue.
#
We’re more than 15 months away from the presidential election. But in North Carolina, an important _special_ election is just seven weeks away. In a district roiled by a major ballot fraud scandal, Dan McCready is hoping to flip North Carolina’s 9th from red to blue.
**Today we’re asking you to[help us fundraise for Dan McCready](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18338?refcode=ema20190723-44236&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=44236%2E444211%2EkiWEPM), but first we want to explain why he needs your support:**
* First, the race is a **TOSSUP** according to Cook Political. A new poll yesterday showed the race all tied up (46-46).
* Donald Trump and Mike Pence both held events for Dan’s opponent, because they know it’s a must-win race.
* Dan McCready is a **top target for the NRA** , which is spending money to mail out attacks on him.
* Above all, Dan is the right candidate for the job. A Marine Corps veteran who served in Iraq, he went on to found a solar energy company.

Dan’s not accepting ANY corporate PAC money, so he’s relying on grassroots fundraising to win. With just seven weeks left, he really needs our help.
[Can you split $3 between Dan’s campaign and Beto right now to help us flip this district from red to blue? In a race this close, your contribution could mean the difference between victory and defeat.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18338?refcode=ema20190723-44236&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=44236%2E444211%2EkiWEPM)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18338?refcode=ema20190723-44236&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=44236%2E444211%2EkiWEPM)**
The margin in November’s election in NC-9, despite severe election fraud and gerrymandering, was just 905 votes. A few more contributions from those of us on Team Beto could carry Dan across the finish line to a big win.
Let’s make this happen.
\- Team Beto

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=22&akid=44236%2E444211%2EkiWEPM). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Bill de Blasio
subject: Less than two hours to enter...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020
body:
Enter soon: this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to join me ends in less than two hours.
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21196/1630b3eb/51232d09/5f555849/1847572925/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NiJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_detroitcontest?refcode=686_org_em_fr")
Friend --
There are less than two hours to enter for a chance to join me at the debate!
Since we never would have gotten this opportunity without support from people like you, friend, I want to guarantee that you have the opportunity to join me in Detroit. But enter soon: **this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity ends in less than two hours** , at 3:00 p.m. EDT today
**[Donate $1 now to be automatically entered to win an all-expenses-paid trip for yourself and a companion to join me at the second Democratic primary debate in Detroit on July 31.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21196/1630b3eb/51232d09/5f555849/1847572925/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NiJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_detroitcontest?refcode=686_org_em_fr")**
Or _[click here](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21196/1630b3eb/51232d09/5f555848/1847572925/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NiJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/s/enter-to-win-detroit-debate?source=686_org_em_fr")_ to be entered without making a contribution.
If we nominate a candidate who represents the status quo, we will hand re-election to Donald Trump.
I believe that progressive action should be at the heart and soul of our party, which is why I specifically challenged Beto O'Rourke for mischaracterizing Medicare for All at the last debate. Every American deserves the right to health care, no matter how much money they make.
[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21196/1630b3eb/51232d09/5f555849/1847572925/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NiJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_detroitcontest?refcode=686_org_em_fr")
Almost everything we've fought for in New York City has upset the status quo, and I can't wait to bring that same approach to the debate stage in Detroit. I would be honored to have someone with a heart like you to join my team and me.
But with the debate coming up fast, we can't accept any entries after 3:00 p.m. EDT on Tuesday, July 23.
**[Will you join me in Detroit? Donate $1 before 3:00 p.m. EDT on July 23 to automatically enter your name-> ](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21196/1630b3eb/51232d09/5f555849/1847572925/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NiJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_detroitcontest?refcode=686_org_em_fr")**
I can't wait to meet you at the debate and keep working with you to bring the working people of America to the forefront of this race.
Hope to see you there!
Bill

The correct deadline is today at 3:00 p.m. EDT, so be sure to **[enter now!](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21196/1630b3eb/51232d09/5f555849/1847572925/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NiJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_detroitcontest?refcode=686_org_em_fr")**

subject: road trip!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce13/3eb3e2fc/5a7186fc/744a3066/675358590/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.julianforthefuture.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20190723_em_nv_update_all&source=20190723_em_nv_update_all")
---
| | **Who doesn't love a road trip?!** | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce13/3eb3e2fc/5a7186fc/744a3065/675358590/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.mobilize.us/julianforthefuture/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=20190723_em_nv_update_all&source=20190723_em_nv_update_all")
---
**People First is not just a slogan, it 's our mission.**
Last week, Team Nevada piled into a car and embarked on a 4-day, 11-stop listening tour across rural Nevada.
They went to the people who are hurting most, the people who all too often feel left behind, to hear them speak on the lack of vital resources in their communities. At every stop, locals commonly spoke on the absence of**quality healthcare access** , **proper education funding** and the **need for expansive updates to infrastructure**.
[](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce13/3eb3e2fc/5a7186fc/744a3064/675358590/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.mobilize.us/julianforthefuture/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=20190723_em_nv_update_all&source=20190723_em_nv_update_all")
---
* **In Tonopah,** people are driving 1.5 hours to the nearest hospital in Hawthorne.
* **In Pahrump,** the local high school is not accredited.
* **In Lovelock,** forced to decide between healthcare and other vital needs.

In all of these communities, infrastructural issues largely cut off their access to essential resources.
**Imagine trying to receive emergency healthcare without proper roads or electricity lines.**
[](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce13/3eb3e2fc/5a7186fc/744a3063/675358590/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.mobilize.us/julianforthefuture/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=20190723_em_nv_update_all&source=20190723_em_nv_update_all")
---

**This trip was about uplifting voices and putting People First.** We will visit places often overlooked by other candidates to hear about the issues that matter to your family. You continue to inspire us to keep developing comprehensive policy platforms that address your needs and your experiences.
A big thank you to everyone that came out to share their stories with us!
[Please sign up to volunteer](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce13/3eb3e2fc/5a7186fc/744a3062/675358590/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://juliancastro.com/volunteer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5+-+Please+sign+up+to+volunteer&utm_campaign=20190723_em_nv_update_all&source=20190723_em_nv_update_all") or [click the donate button](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce13/3eb3e2fc/5a7186fc/744a3061/675358590/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-castro-2020?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6+-+click+the+donate+button&utm_campaign=20190723_em_nv_update_all&source=20190723_em_nv_update_all") to make sure our team can continue holding meaningful events and trips like these throughout the country.
\--

**We'll see you on the road!**
#TeamJulian

[**DONATE**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce13/3eb3e2fc/5a7186fc/744a3060/675358590/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-castro-2020?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20190723_em_nv_update_all&source=20190723_em_nv_update_all")

| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce13/3eb3e2fc/5a7186fc/744a306c/675358590/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20190723_em_nv_update_all&source=20190723_em_nv_update_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce13/3eb3e2fc/5a7186fc/744a306b/675358590/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=20190723_em_nv_update_all&source=20190723_em_nv_update_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce13/3eb3e2fc/5a7186fc/744a306a/675358590/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20190723_em_nv_update_all&source=20190723_em_nv_update_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.
---

Friend,

_The people of Indiana are who Governor Holcomb is focused on every single day. That’s why his 2020 campaign is all about Putting People First._

The fact is, Governor Holcomb can’t be successful without your help. Hoosiers like you all across our state are responsible for this historic success we are seeing in Indiana today.

**[If you support Governor Holcomb’s re-election, today we’re asking you to help us in our mission of Putting People First. We are looking for volunteers from every corner of Indiana to join our Holcomb Volunteer Crew. Are you in?](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c34153baced549e889fd9e448a58f5e1&_e=lfjtxPQZ2lXFjQ9ANanzyr6WB6QqDGT2BUmOy8wMcNo43kY5uii4z_n6pHVnlC_ovis1lvANW7er-O_u7jdAOoUuF4d5YGrougwnsTIUQnnbKk29SkO1mPmKX3oKxnwd8AVNtAnpBjc5AQ693c-qt1cwIWthHYhRXFX24WZ1Onal-uyA2-wSpZ-9eFZC06zPlY3jMzfqFrWkA8EE0V_IfgLStxyNqM28wppZ4_q52P5r2BVfaor22CAMfELWM36MpbYD41JdMWrIMsdhUnSzB-2EPhAsnBVwa_xsvsbe3_5Ih2sckkP27Kx0a9LD08gabBW-OLu4o_ZiPSRsfeUl1owqG2HyAwIQtjFp_TK7kEFhU7K6QyjxnorCwR1Nyhq9dtLBF4cCRX1siZX5B1UnOA%3D%3D)**

We’re looking for Hoosiers in each of Indiana’s 92 counties to help us knock on doors, make phone calls, attend community events, help us spread our message of Indiana’s growth, and more.

Right now, you can make the biggest impact by helping us collect petition signatures to get Governor Holcomb on the ballot next year! This can be as easy as asking your friends, family and neighbors to sign in support of Governor Holcomb.
[ **Add your name to join the Holcomb Volunteer Crew** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c34153baced549e889fd9e448a58f5e1&_e=lfjtxPQZ2lXFjQ9ANanzyr6WB6QqDGT2BUmOy8wMcNo43kY5uii4z_n6pHVnlC_ovis1lvANW7er-O_u7jdAOoUuF4d5YGrougwnsTIUQnnbKk29SkO1mPmKX3oKxnwd8AVNtAnpBjc5AQ693c-qt1cwIWthHYhRXFX24WZ1Onal-uyA2-wSpZ-9eFZC06zPA9y8QbZz5OuiS8W6bmtTXUeVe-M7KDpsXdN0Y3Pt9mlNtNzYioNMFNSh1TmVa_-0CnvldtM7okTGK4xGW7cXc-fUb6SNlAAQFgpIYWurZytpeXgODxLr60d0NXv4m6m7ZVMYK4tAyHV8IF9nJDONZzdEkCW-PmFOswxfFZr3dFu1c3Wj9vcBlYNw3p91uvX8HmUvt6C3yVDG7Zt4-Vlw6Q%3D%3D)
This campaign is about Putting People First, and we can’t do that without you – the people of Indiana. **[Add your name today to join the Holcomb Volunteer Crew, and a member of our team will be in touch soon.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=c34153baced549e889fd9e448a58f5e1&_e=lfjtxPQZ2lXFjQ9ANanzyr6WB6QqDGT2BUmOy8wMcNo43kY5uii4z_n6pHVnlC_ovis1lvANW7er-O_u7jdAOoUuF4d5YGrougwnsTIUQnnbKk29SkO1mPmKX3oKxnwd8AVNtAnpBjc5AQ693c-qt1cwIWthHYhRXFX24WZ1Onal-uyA2-wSpZ-9eFZC06zPYTzW-GismnfdJELg7DcjJ8e0s3O8n7zbogDZ6EkWexIciJRB2ltsH2jFtDeI4Y0iJZx9X4qIQF_eeSf182kK_hLJit1EZqyr6Aj-vi0xOjoRkZr5EsJrMpjJXzBB0dGVopuw7mmE5-dkkt7Cb_K3amg-PEr1bAkt3mvdX41wgKv-QZwMwQEygHideqOufoYhaYFbZ9quEjy1f-ZoklC-Dg%3D%3D)**

Thank you,
Holcomb Volunteer Crew

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: The witch hunt continues...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---

| Patriot,
Just when we thought that the witch hunt against our President was over the Democrats are bringing Robert Mueller to testify before Congress tomorrow morning. His report found NO EVIDENCE OF COLLUSION so what could the Democrats possibly have to ask him this time?
Unfortunately, the Democrats have an agenda to bring down President Trump however they can - no matter how much it costs tax-payers like you and me.
The socialist Democrats and fake news media still are looking for anything that de-legitimizes President Trump... but we - the silent majority - see right through their propaganda.
Will you help me tell the Democrats and the mainstream news media to end the witch hunt?

body:
Elizabeth wants to change the way campaign fundraising is done. The size of your donation doesn't get you more access. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e9eb/45c30650/1402b936b/669e13cb/119537215/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
| **This campaign is funded by grassroots donors, not special interests. Make your first contribution, and you might get a call from Elizabeth >>**

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e9eb/45c30650/1402b936b/669e13ca/119537215/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDcyMmVtMi1mdWxsLWIifQ==/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190722em2-full-b")
---

When Elizabeth stands at her kitchen counter to call grassroots donors, some people don't believe that it's her on the other end. Some will even hang up, thinking that it's a pre-recorded robocall.

And that's probably because during most presidential campaigns, calling donors who give at any level is unheard of. Usually, "call time" for candidates means dialing up wealthy donors and asking for huge checks.

But Elizabeth wants to change the way campaign fundraising is done. She doesn't make calls based on how much money someone is able to donate -- because a person's wealth shouldn't determine how much access they get to a presidential candidate.

**Elizabeth spends her "call time" talking with grassroots donors who chip in any amount. Will you be one of them? Make your first contribution today, and Elizabeth might call you to say thanks.** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

name: Morley
subject: endorse Tim!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
We are proud to have the endorsement of prominent labor leaders as well as local government officials -- **but no endorsement is as meaningful as yours, folks.**

[**That 's why I'm asking you to pledge here to become a community endorser of this campaign.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9c02/5486deaa/23271b0a/dc8a86b/80127059/VEsH/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/s/become-a-community-endorser-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+Thatrsquos+why+Irsquom+asking+you+to+ple&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190723_2_2_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190723_2_2_T2") It is only because of your continued support that Tim and our campaign have gotten so far. By becoming a community endorser you are expressing to everyone at Ryan HQ just how committed you are to this grassroots movement.

[BECOME A COMMUNITY ENDORSER NOW](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9c02/5486deaa/23271b0a/dc8a86a/80127059/VEsE/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/s/become-a-community-endorser-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+BECOME+A+COMMUNITY+ENDORSER+NOW&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190723_2_2_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190723_2_2_T2")
Your official endorsement would mean the world to Tim, Andrea, and everyone at the campaign. We are fueled by people just like you -- so it's not just about wanting your support -- it's about needing it in order to continue spreading our message. [**Can you commit to becoming a community endorser today?**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9c02/5486deaa/23271b0a/dc8a86d/80127059/VEsF/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/s/become-a-community-endorser-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+Can+you+commit+to+becoming+a+community+e&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190723_2_2_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190723_2_2_T2")

Thanks for being on our side!

-Morley

|
---

We are fueled by people just like you -- so it's not just about wanting your support -- it's about needing it in order to continue spreading our message. "" Thanks for being on our side! -Morley | Paid for by Tim Ryan for America Contribute now to help Tim take his vision for our future across the United States! "" We know email can be overwhelming, so if you'd like to receive only the most important updates, you can join our email-lite list "", or unsubscribe from all email by "" | |

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: Save the elephants. Save the snow leopards.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2de88/6cd27893/4fd50a0d/1580b7c8/2837623068/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | _Elephants. Snow leopards. Rhinos. Mountain gorillas. Leatherback sea turtles._ Too many animals are endangered, at risk of disappearing from our Earth entirely. This has been sped up by unlawful trafficking and poaching of exotic animals, ones that our grandchildren will only see in pictures and books if we don't take this fight on right here and right now. **I have a plan to fight the overexploitation and hunting of endangered animals.** [**Join our effort and sign the petition: Urge Congress to fight the poaching of endangered animals right away.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2de88/6cd27893/4fd50a0d/1580b7c9/2837623068/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/petition/wildlife-trafficking/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-07-wildlife-trafficking-email") How it works: our plan would allow the State Department to offer rewards for whistleblowers who come forward with tips or information that disrupt or shut down traffickers and poachers. Our bipartisan plan has the support of top environmental and animal welfare groups, but we need to build a grassroots movement to ensure this gets done in Washington D.C. [**Help us fight illegal poaching and animal trafficking: Urge Congress to stand with us today.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2de88/6cd27893/4fd50a0d/1580b7c9/2837623068/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/petition/wildlife-trafficking/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-07-wildlife-trafficking-email") **_Jeff_** [Sign the Petition](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2de88/6cd27893/4fd50a0d/1580b7c9/2837623068/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/petition/wildlife-trafficking/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-07-wildlife-trafficking-email") |

Yours in service,

Francis | [$10](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-membership?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=5+-+10&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190723_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190723_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190723_1_1") | [$25](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-membership?amount=25&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=6+-+25&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190723_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190723_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190723_1_1") | [$50](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-membership?amount=50&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=7+-+50&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190723_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190723_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190723_1_1")

name: Dan Baer
subject: Tomorrow, testifying before Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Baer for Colorado
body:
Robert Mueller, and an opportunity for all Americans.
|
---
[ ](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8265c/232dfd1/9b73242/62a11545/621353683/VEsH/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://www.danforcolorado.com")

| | Friends, Tomorrow, Robert Mueller will testify before Congress. Before running for Senate, I wrote that _[The Mueller Report is a test for the United States](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8265c/232dfd1/9b73242/62a1154a/621353683/VEsE/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://foreignpolicy.com/2019/03/23/the-mueller-report-is-a-test-for-the-united-states-trump-special-counsel-russia/")_ and that "the eyes of the world will focus on whether Washington has kept to a rule of law process in addition to the inevitable political one." **While things seem grim, I see this as an opportunity. An opportunity for all Americans.** While I would implore everyone to read the full Mueller Report, we all have the opportunity to learn about the Special Counsel's investigation from the person who knows it best. That's a rare gift. **But this isn 't just an opportunity for Americans to learn. This is an opportunity for us to uphold the rule of law in America.** An opportunity for us to show that our government will follow the facts, wherever they may lead. An opportunity for us to show that the rule of law applies to everyone, including the President. No patriot can take pleasure in learning about the extent to which foreign powers have sabotaged our democratic institutions. No patriot can delight in the potential wrongdoing of a president sworn to "preserve, protect, and defend" the Constitution. Tomorrow's testimony will not be the last page in this painful chapter of America's story. We should continue to demand that Congress complete a thorough investigation, and that it take steps to address gaps in our defenses, to deter would-be aggressors, and to hold those culpable of wrongdoing accountable. We are living in a difficult time. Over and over and over and over again throughout our history--imperfectly and unevenly but reliably-- Americans have risen to meet the challenge of the moment that faces them. I believe we will do so again. In solidarity,
\--Dan
---
|
---
[](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8265c/232dfd1/9b73242/62a1154b/621353683/VEsF/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://www.facebook.com/DanForColorado/") [](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8265c/232dfd1/9b73242/62a11548/621353683/VEsC/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://twitter.com/danbaer")

Dan Baer for Colorado
PO Box 1199
Denver, CO 80201

[Unsubscribe](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8265c/232dfd1/9b73242/62a11549/621353683/VEsD/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://go.danforcolorado.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Dan Baer for Colorado

| | I need your eyes on these three critical pieces of news:

[FIRST:](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b50c/18e32a7f/57aab754/7bb1612b/2430508197/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190722_em_fr_b1_BRL_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25") My race was named the most competitive open Senate seat in the entire country.

[THEN:](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b50c/18e32a7f/57aab754/7bb1612b/2430508197/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190722_em_fr_b1_BRL_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25") Mitch McConnell begged his wealthy special interest donors for cash.

[NOW:](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b50c/18e32a7f/57aab754/7bb1612b/2430508197/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190722_em_fr_b1_BRL_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25") [McConnell just announced donors funneled a whopping $3.8 MILLION to bail out his Republican Senate.](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b50c/18e32a7f/57aab754/7bb1612b/2430508197/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190722_em_fr_b1_BRL_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")

I will not let Republicans' massive checks steal our historic shot to win the Senate.

I need a swift and powerful Democratic response -- 1,200 gifts before midnight -- to close this gap.

Can I count on your $15 before midnight? | | [**Chip in $10 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b50c/18e32a7f/57aab754/7bb16128/2430508197/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190723_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: The fight for voting rights is happening in every state legislature across the country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
Friend,

State by state, Republican-controlled state legislatures raced to impose new restrictions on the right to vote this year.

Tennessee: Governor signed a law that creates new penalties for third-party voter registration groups
Texas: Republican State Senators passed a bill threatening voters who commit innocent mistakes with long prison sentences
Florida: Governor enacted a law that again disenfranchises and imposes a poll tax on those who have served their time in prison
Arizona: Republican trifecta signed laws restricting access to emergency vote centers and extending voter ID laws to early voting period

But across the country, voting rights advances offered new hope in states with Democratic majorities.

Maine: Became the 18th state to enact automatic voter registration
Nevada: Passed a law to immediately restore the right to vote for people with prior felony convictions
New Mexico: Joined 19 states by enacting same-day voter registration on Election Day
New York: Signed sweeping reforms into law to create early voting, consolidate primary dates, and pre-register young people

The urgency of this moment remains. Our right to vote is only safe when we defend it.

Will you donate today to help us defend the right to vote and demand fairness in every election held, in every law passed, and in every decision made?

DONATE » https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfightga2018-2?refcode=IE072319GRAPHIC

---------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe, go to:
https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

Paid for by Fair Fight

name: Team Hickenlooper
subject: One week from today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
One week from today, John will take the debate stage once again--and he intends to make the most of his time at the podium. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771729/691c9bd/6d3f6e13/11a46007/3458636748/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend, John stood tall in the first debate--but with ten candidates on stage, he only had time to briefly preview his ideas for taking our bold, progressive successes in Colorado nationwide.

One week from today, John will take the debate stage once again--and he intends to make the most of his time at the podium.

But in order for him to earn time in the fall debates, we need your help. For John to participate in any debates past next week, we need to show that 130,000 unique supporters have joined this team.

**We don 't yet have a record of support associated with this email address--if you haven't yet chipped in to help John build this team of 130,000, please do so today. $1 is all it takes.** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190723_TH_20190723-fr-TH-oneweek-ndnr_ndnr_b1&recurring=auto&amounts=1,5,25,50,100,500&amount=1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Once fall hits, primary season will be in full swing--but without your help, John won't be a part of it.

We can't do this without you. _**[Will you chip in $1 today to help us grow this team?](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190723_TH_20190723-fr-TH-oneweek-ndnr_ndnr_l1&recurring=auto&amounts=1,5,25,50,100,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Thank you,
Team Hickenlooper **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190723_JH_20190723-fr-TH-oneweek-ndnr_ndnr_contribbutton&recurring=auto&amounts=1,5,25,50,100,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

Devin's day in court is in just a few weeks, so we're re-opening our Rapid Response Legal Defense Fund to make sure The Cow has all the resources she needs to #DefeatDevin. **[We're forwarding her original message to you below -- check it out, and if you can, we'd be grateful if you chipped in to our Fund to support her>>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d070f/72412298/4376ae08/61021c55/471991745/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJudW5lc192c19jb3ciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzE5MDcyM19SZXR1cm5vZnRoZUNvd19VMV9YMSJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nunes_vs_cow?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190723_ReturnoftheCow_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+Were+forwarding+her+original+message+to+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190723_ReturnoftheCow_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190723_ReturnoftheCow_U1_X1")** | | | [#DEFEATDEVIN >> ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d070f/72412298/4376ae08/61021c54/471991745/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJudW5lc192c19jb3ciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzE5MDcyM19SZXR1cm5vZnRoZUNvd19VMV9YMSIsImUzc3lOWDE5IjoiMjUifQ==/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nunes_vs_cow?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190723_ReturnoftheCow_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+DEFEATDEVIN+gtgt+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190723_ReturnoftheCow_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190723_ReturnoftheCow_U1_X1")

**\----------------Forwarded Message----------------**
**From: **The Cow
**Date:** Tues, Mar. 26th at 5:34 P.M.
**Subject:** A Message from The Cow
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
Dear friends and farmers,
The Cow here! Or **@Devincow** for those of you on Twitter. I'm taking a break from grazing the Iowa pastures to send you an update on the $250 million lawsuit Devin Nunes filed against Twitter because of my jokes.
**Devin Nunes might not be a-moo-sed that I have more followers than he does, but I happen to think that his blind loyalty to Trump is udder-ly ridiculous.**
Thankfully, the Voter Protection Project has offered to step up and defend me -- and our 1st Amendment -- against Nunes' bullying, frivolous lawsuit. If Nunes's lawsuit is successful, the Voter Protection Project has offered to fund our legal defense!
And if the moo-ney isn't used (that's the hope!) -- all your hard earned cheddar goes directly to defeating Nunes in 2020!
**[Can you chip in whatever you can to help fund our legal defense AND send Nunes onto greener pastures in 2020?>>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d070f/72412298/4376ae08/61021c57/471991745/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJudW5lc192c19jb3ciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzE5MDcyM19SZXR1cm5vZnRoZUNvd19VMV9YMSJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nunes_vs_cow?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190723_ReturnoftheCow_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Can+you+chip+in+whatever+you+can+to+help&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190723_ReturnoftheCow_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190723_ReturnoftheCow_U1_X1")**
