Nunes is more focused on starting beef with me than he is on governing effectively. He's butchering his own reputation, and his extremism and lack of regard for democracy have no place in our country.
**It 's critical that we defeat Nunes, his right-wing cronies, and their attempts at voter suppression. The integrity of our country is at stake.**
**[I'm no cash cow, so donate here to help fund our legal defense AND retire Nunes in 2020 >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d070f/72412298/4376ae08/61021c5c/471991745/VEsHBA/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJudW5lc192c19jb3ciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzE5MDcyM19SZXR1cm5vZnRoZUNvd19VMV9YMSJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nunes_vs_cow?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190723_ReturnoftheCow_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=11+-+Irsquom+no+cash+cow+so+donate+here+to+he&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190723_ReturnoftheCow_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190723_ReturnoftheCow_U1_X1")**
I won't milk this any longer -- thanks for listening!
Cow

body:
Elizabeth doesn't spend her time chasing big checks from special interest groups -- so she does have room in her schedule to make thank you calls to grassroots donors. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e9e6/45c30650/141d05d0e/669e054d/3842730483/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Elizabeth doesn't spend her time chasing big checks from special interest groups -- so she _does_ have room in her schedule to make thank you calls to grassroots donors.

It's one of her favorite parts of the campaign. She gets the chance to hear about the issues that matter to them, their families, and their communities.

People's stories inspire her to keep making plans to help solve the problems working families face. From the Ultra Millionaire Tax, to Universal Child Care, to canceling student debt and more, Elizabeth's policies are possible in part because of the conversations that she has with voters.

And by being a part of this team, you're helping make big, structural change a reality -- **and helping Elizabeth spread the message about our grassroots movement nationwide.**

**We couldn 't be more grateful, and neither could Elizabeth. Chip in anything you can and help build our movement -- Elizabeth might make a call to say thank you!** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

name: Team Beto
subject: urgent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
Donald Trump’s official campaign just attacked Beto in a head-spinning tweet:
#
Donald Trump’s official campaign just attacked Beto in a head-spinning tweet:
[We need you to step up right now. Contribute $3 to Beto’s campaign and help us quickly push back against this desperate attack from Team Trump.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18384?refcode=ema20190723-44289&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=44289%2E444211%2ELvaq8r)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18384?refcode=ema20190723-44289&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=44289%2E444211%2ELvaq8r)**
When the latest Trump rally devolved into racist chantings of, “SEND HER BACK, SEND HER BACK,” Beto made sure to stand up to it, and pin the blame exactly where it belongs — on Trump. And it’s clearly making his team nervous.
[Join us in fighting back against these attacks and sticking up for what’s right. Rush a donation to our campaign today.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18384?refcode=ema20190723-44289&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=44289%2E444211%2ELvaq8r)
Everyone stepping up to contribute now is sending a powerful message about the kind of country we want. And that we won’t let these disgraceful attacks on Beto stand.
We believe in a country where the differences between us — of party, of geography, of race, of gender, of who you love or who you pray to — don’t define us. A country where everyone belongs and no one’s left out or left behind.
**We know the only way to build an America**** _for_****all of us starts with a campaign**** _by_****all of us.**
[That’s why grassroots donations are so important to making this all work. Can you make one today?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18384?refcode=ema20190723-44289&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=44289%2E444211%2ELvaq8r)
Thank you for everything.
\- Team Beto

Paid for by Beto for America

But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). As Michael's finance director, I'm responsible for making sure our campaign has what it takes to get his message out across the country without having to cut corners.

I joined Michael's team because we need ambitious plans to fix our broken politics, and I know that it all starts with this campaign.

Michael won't take a single penny from corporate special interests.

We're building a grassroots movement that's powered by people like YOU!

We can clean up corruption, create opportunity, and strengthen our democracy.

_It all starts here._

[**We have 8 DAYS until Michael takes the debate stage and that same night we 're facing a huge end-of-month deadline.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbad18/134673f2/f2eae2c/69969143/779836982/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B2_072319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
